name: Tsinghua Tongfang Co., Ltd.
summary: Tsinghua Tongfang Co., Ltd. operates as an information and security company. It offers electronic information products, smart city, Internet services, public safety, industrial equipment, illumination, energy conservation and environmental protection, lighting, medical treatment and health, and financial and insurance services and solutions, as well as production, research, and development services. Tsinghua Tongfang Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Beijing, China.
